name.title: Domain Name
name.description: The domain name for which to relay mail

mail-server-host.title: Mail Server Host
mail-server-host.description: The backend mail server host (IPv6 or IPv4) for this domain

mail-server-port.title: Mail Server Port
mail-server-port.description: The backend mail server port for this domain

authentication.title: Authentication Method
authentication.description: How this domain authenticates to the relay nodes for outbound mail

fingerprints.title: Backend TLS certificate(s) fingerprint(s)
fingerprints.description: List of fingerprints of the backend's certificates to authentify the backend to the relay nodes
